label: Ashling, the Limitless
desc: 5-color Elemental commander deck led by Ashling, the Limitless

cards.name: Ashling, the Limitless
cards.text:
Elemental permanent spells you cast from your hand gain evoke {4} as you cast them. (If you cast a spell for its evoke cost, it's sacrificed when it enters.)
Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken Elemental, create a token that's a copy of it. The token gains haste until end of turn. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice it unless you pay {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.

cards.name: Incandescent Soulstoke
cards.text:
Other Elemental creatures you control get +1/+1.
{1}{R}, {T}: You may put an Elemental creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

cards.name: Roaming Throne
cards.text:
Ward {2}
As this creature enters, choose a creature type.
This creature is the chosen type in addition to its other types.
If a triggered ability of another creature you control of the chosen type triggers, it triggers an additional time.

cards.name: Champion of the Path
cards.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, behold an Elemental and exile it. (Exile an Elemental you control or an Elemental card from your hand.)
Whenever another Elemental you control enters, it deals damage equal to its power to each opponent.
When this creature leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Eclipsed Flamekin
cards.text: When this creature enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an Elemental, Island, or Mountain card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

cards.name: Flamebraider
cards.text: {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast Elemental spells or activate abilities of Elemental sources.

cards.name: Paleoloth
cards.text: Whenever another creature you control with power 5 or greater enters, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Rottenmouth Viper
cards.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of nonland permanents. This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent sacrificed this way.
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, put a blight counter on it. Then for each blight counter on it, each opponent loses 4 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice or discards a card.

cards.name: Sunderflock
cards.text:
This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the greatest mana value among Elementals you control.
Flying
When this creature enters, if you cast it, return all non-Elemental creatures to their owners' hands.

cards.name: Twinflame Travelers
cards.text:
Flying
If a triggered ability of another Elemental you control triggers, it triggers an additional time.

cards.name: Beza, the Bounding Spring
cards.text: When Beza enters, create a Treasure token if an opponent controls more lands than you. You gain 4 life if an opponent has more life than you. Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens if an opponent controls more creatures than you. Draw a card if an opponent has more cards in hand than you.

cards.name: Cavalier of Flame
cards.text:
{1}{R}: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
When this creature enters, discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards.
When this creature dies, it deals X damage to each opponent and each planeswalker they control, where X is the number of land cards in your graveyard.

cards.name: Elemental Bond
cards.text: Whenever a creature you control with power 3 or greater enters, draw a card.

cards.name: Faithless Looting
cards.text:
Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

cards.name: Frantic Search
cards.text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Untap up to three lands.

cards.name: Greater Good
cards.text: Sacrifice a creature: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power, then discard three cards.

cards.name: Life's Legacy
cards.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

cards.name: Maelstrom Wanderer
cards.text:
Creatures you control have haste.
Cascade, cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order. Then do it again.)

cards.name: Mulldrifter
cards.text:
Flying
When this creature enters, draw two cards.
Evoke {2}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

cards.name: Nulldrifter
cards.text:
When you cast this spell, draw two cards.
Flying
Annihilator 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent of their choice.)
Evoke {2}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

cards.name: Omnath, Locus of the Roil
cards.text:
When Omnath enters, it deals damage to any target equal to the number of Elementals you control.
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target Elemental you control. If you control eight or more lands, draw a card.

cards.name: Temur Ascendancy
cards.text:
Creatures you control have haste.
Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, you may draw a card.

cards.name: Riveteers Ascendancy
cards.text: Whenever you sacrifice a creature, you may return target creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Do this only once each turn.

cards.name: Cinder Glade
cards.text:
({T}: Add {R} or {G}.)
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more basic lands.

cards.name: Command Tower
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

cards.name: Exotic Orchard
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

cards.name: Fabled Passage
cards.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.

cards.name: Great Hall of the Citadel
cards.text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Add two mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast legendary spells.

cards.name: Path of Ancestry
cards.text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

cards.name: Reliquary Tower
cards.text:
You have no maximum hand size.
{T}: Add {C}.

cards.name: Rockfall Vale
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

cards.name: Rootbound Crag
cards.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Forest.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.

cards.name: Secluded Courtyard
cards.text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type or activate an ability of a creature source of the chosen type.

cards.name: The Grey Havens
cards.text:
When The Grey Havens enters, scry 1.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color among legendary creature cards in your graveyard.

cards.name: The World Tree
cards.text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G}.
As long as you control six or more lands, lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
{W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for any number of God cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

cards.name: Unclaimed Territory
cards.text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type.

cards.name: Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth
cards.text: Each land is a Forest in addition to its other land types.

cards.name: Omnath, Locus of Rage
cards.text:
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 5/5 red and green Elemental creature token.
Whenever Omnath or another Elemental you control dies, Omnath deals 3 damage to any target.

cards.name: Yarok, the Desecrated
cards.text:
Deathtouch, lifelink
If a permanent entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

cards.name: Heroic Intervention
cards.text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

cards.name: Lightning Greaves
cards.text:
Equipped creature has haste and shroud. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities.)
Equip {0}

cards.name: Teferi's Veil
cards.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, it phases out at end of combat. (While it's phased out, it's treated as though it doesn't exist. It phases in before you untap during your next untap step.)

cards.name: Animar, Soul of Elements
cards.text:
Protection from white and from black
Whenever you cast a creature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Animar.
Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each +1/+1 counter on Animar.

cards.name: Arcane Signet
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

cards.name: Bloom Tender
cards.text: Vivid — {T}: For each color among permanents you control, add one mana of that color.

cards.name: Cavalier of Thorns
cards.text:
Reach
When this creature enters, reveal the top five cards of your library. Put a land card from among them onto the battlefield and the rest into your graveyard.
When this creature dies, you may exile it. If you do, put another target card from your graveyard on top of your library.

cards.name: Faeburrow Elder
cards.text:
Vigilance
This creature gets +1/+1 for each color among permanents you control.
{T}: For each color among permanents you control, add one mana of that color.

cards.name: Farseek
cards.text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

cards.name: Fellwar Stone
cards.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

cards.name: Helga, Skittish Seer
cards.text:
Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value 4 or greater, you draw a card, gain 1 life, and put a +1/+1 counter on Helga.
{T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is Helga's power. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells with mana value 4 or greater or creature spells with {X} in their mana costs.

cards.name: Kodama's Reach
cards.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

cards.name: Leyline Immersion
cards.text:
Enchant legendary creature
Enchanted creature has ward {2} and "{T}: Add five mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast spells."

cards.name: Nyxbloom Ancient
cards.text:
Trample
If you tap a permanent for mana, it produces three times as much of that mana instead.

cards.name: Risen Reef
cards.text: Whenever this creature or another Elemental you control enters, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't put the card onto the battlefield, put it into your hand.

cards.name: Sneak Attack
cards.text: {R}: You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Sacrifice the creature at the beginning of the next end step.

cards.name: Sol Ring
cards.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

cards.name: Temur Battlecrier
cards.text: During your turn, spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each creature you control with power 4 or greater.

cards.name: Tireless Provisioner
cards.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a Food token or a Treasure token. (Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life." Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

cards.name: Grave Sifter
cards.text: When this creature enters, each player chooses a creature type and returns any number of cards of that type from their graveyard to their hand.

cards.name: Greenwarden of Murasa
cards.text:
When this creature enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.
When this creature dies, you may exile it. If you do, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Aethersnipe
cards.text:
When this creature enters, return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
Evoke {1}{U}{U} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

cards.name: Avatar's Wrath
cards.text:
Choose up to one target creature, then airbend all other creatures. (Exile them. While each one is exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.)
Until your next turn, your opponents can't cast spells from anywhere other than their hands.
Exile Avatar's Wrath.

cards.name: Bane of Progress
cards.text: When this creature enters, destroy all artifacts and enchantments. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature for each permanent destroyed this way.

cards.name: Cavalier of Dawn
cards.text:
Vigilance
When this creature enters, destroy up to one target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 colorless Golem artifact creature token.
When this creature dies, return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

cards.name: Cavalier of Night
cards.text:
Lifelink
When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
When this creature dies, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.name: Fury
cards.text:
Double strike
When this creature enters, it deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures and/or planeswalkers.
Evoke—Exile a red card from your hand.

cards.name: Swan Song
cards.text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.

cards.name: Terror of the Peaks

Flying
Spells your opponents cast that target this creature cost an additional 3 life to cast.
Whenever another creature you control enters, this creature deals damage equal to that creature's power to any target.

cards.name: Titan of Industry

Reach, trample
When this creature enters, choose two —
• Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
• Target player gains 5 life.
• Create a 4/4 green Rhino Warrior creature token.
• Put a shield counter on a creature you control.

cards.name: Tyrant of Discord
cards.text: When this creature enters, target opponent chooses a permanent they control at random and sacrifices it. If a nonland permanent is sacrificed this way, repeat this process.
